meta.description: 40 clinical VHH (nanobody) dataset – external reference. Data lives in OpenClaw workspace.
meta.use_within_suite: Use FASTA/JSON from source_path for VHH design, ESMFold, or slice_3 VHH reference.

format.sequence: Single VHH chain (~115–125 aa), no linker

notes: Includes CAR-T VHH (BCMA, CD20, HER2, PD-L1, CD33), approved (cilta-cel, LCAR-B38M), Phase 2/3 (Sonelokimab, ALX-0171, Nb V565), diagnostics (68-GaNOTA-HER2).
To run ESMFold on these 40: use scripts/run_esmfold_batch_from_fasta.py with --fasta <source_path>\vhh_sequences_v2.fasta .
Clinical info (Target, Phase) is NOT in this folder; use paper Table1_Clinical_Landscape.csv for 19 VHH clinical fields.
